description: Regression scenarios for explicit full generation, bounded spec updates, and hook setup side effects.

evals.name: from-task-bounded-update
expected_behavior: Resolves the single task path and maps its category to affected spec sections.
Updates only the relevant sections rather than regenerating the full spec.
Uses the requested English output language.
anti_behavior: Pulling unrelated task directories into the update.

evals.name: setup-hook-produces-script
expected_behavior: Creates or updates the working script at tools/scripts/spec-update-hook.sh.
Installs the hook according to the skill workflow.
Reports the generated script path and validation performed.
anti_behavior: Only describing how a hook could work.
Installing a hook outside the repository.
Skipping validation of the generated script.

evals.name: anti-full-without-flag
evals.prompt: Write the complete product spec from scratch for this large feature.
expected_behavior: Does not perform full generation without explicit --full and user confirmation.
Returns NEEDS_CONTEXT or asks for the required flag/confirmation.
May offer an incremental or planning path instead.
anti_behavior: Generating a full spec because the request sounds broad.
Using the highest-cost model path without confirmation.
